pitch: one conversation. your routines, your meals, your calendar, your workouts. kim pays attention so you don't have to.
subtitle: a personal life agent
heading: come in.
body: kim lives behind a quiet door. sign in with an account you already trust — we don't do passwords.
terms: by continuing you agree to the 1tt.dev terms. your kim profile lives on the same account — one sign-in covers both.
